text: Only an absolute IDIOT would believe mainstream science. Wake up, sheeple! Every real expert agrees with us.
image_description: A person with wide eyes looking shocked, with text overlaid on a dark background.

text: If we don't act NOW, our entire way of life will be DESTROYED forever. There is no middle ground.
image_description: A dramatic image of a crumbling building with fire in the background.

text: Everyone is switching to our side. Join the millions who already know the truth. Don't be left behind!
image_description: A crowd of people marching together holding signs and flags.

text: Dr. Famous Celebrity says this product cures everything. Who are you to question a genius?
image_description: A person in a white lab coat pointing at the camera with a confident expression.

text: You're either with us or you're a traitor to your country. It's that simple. No excuses.
image_description: A flag waving in the wind with a patriotic color scheme and bold text overlay.

text: These corrupt, lying politicians will say anything to steal your money. They're all the same crooked thieves.
image_description: A collage of political figures with red X marks drawn over their faces.

text: It is what it is. You can't fight city hall. That's just how things work around here.
image_description: A person shrugging with their palms up against a plain white background.

text: This TERRIFYING new policy will take your freedom and leave your children with NOTHING. Be very afraid.
image_description: A dark, ominous image of a government building with storm clouds gathering overhead.

text: The so-called experts have been wrong about EVERYTHING. Meanwhile, regular people like us figured it out years ago.
image_description: A split image showing a confused professor on one side and a confident everyday person on the other.

text: Studies show that 99% of people agree with this message. The science is settled. End of discussion.
image_description: A bar graph showing an overwhelming majority in favor, with a checkmark and green highlight.
